message:
Add styled DoctorRenderer for themed health check output (xf-11.4.5)

Introduce DoctorSummary and DoctorRenderer for rich terminal display of
doctor health checks:

- DoctorSummary tallies passed/warning/error counts from check results
- DoctorRenderer dispatches to styled or plain output based on TTY
- Styled mode: Unicode box-drawing title banner, checks grouped by
  category with icons and color-coded status, summary footer with
  pass/warning/error counts and runtime, numbered suggestions section
- Plain mode: simple [OK]/[WARN]/[FAIL] text tags for non-TTY output
- Helper functions: category_name(), category_icon(),
  status_icon_and_color(), status_tag() for display mapping

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
